entry.title: Re: Outsourced Manufacturing - Classic Subcontracting
entry.content:
Thank you Mohamed!

Very useful document

entry.title: Re: MRP Types P1 to P4
entry.content: Is there any business case for these strategies? When these will be used

entry.title: Re: MRP Types P1 to P4
entry.content:
Similarities 
P1, P2, P3, P4Planned orders will be created outside the PTF and Requirements outside PTF will be always considered for planning
Difference 
P1, P3Requirements inside PTF will be considered for planning
P2, P4Requirements inside PTF will not be considered for planning
P1, P2Planned orders which comes inside PTF will be Firmed automatically
P3, P4Planned orders which comes inside PTF will not be Firmed

entry.title: Material Master Data Mass Maintenance - Delete value from EAN code/EAN category field
entry.content:
Hi experts,

Please kindly advise if it is possible to mass delete value from "EAN/UPC" field and "EAN category" field in material master data in S4HANA Public Cloud system. 

Currently, we need to change the EAN code for around 10k records from having value to blank. We have tried with "Start Mass Maitenance - Products" but it is not going well.

Our firts attempt was clearing the value in "EAN/UPC" and "EAN category" and remove check from "Main EAN"  as in attached screenshot, the process ended with no error but the data did not change.

Our second attempt was to add Action Code D to delete the record from table MEAN but it got error as in below screenshots. 

Thank you in advance!

Regards,

Emi

entry.title: Re: Partner Consolidation Unit is blank in ACDOCA
entry.content: Hi Chinnapa Reddy Allam, Consolidation Units created later loaded the data in S4 HANA (Table: ACDOCA)...Thanks

entry.title: Re: Import Sales Orders - Part3: Text fields and pricing elements support
entry.content:
Hi, 

How add text field in order data in sales order template without any manual intervention?

It should be available by default when we download from import sales order app.

please reply earliest

entry.title: Re: How to Secure Your Cloud Foundry Python Application w...
entry.content: https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/btp-cf-buildpacks-python-create..html

entry.title: Re: How to post GI on the RF without TM?
entry.content: Thanks, @Christian_Ries ! Best regards

entry.title: Re: How to create picking warehouse tasks for an outbound...
entry.content: Thanks, @Christian_Ries ! Best regards

entry.title: Re: Can I create a 9 grid Performance/Potential story rep...
entry.content:
Hi,

Yes, this is possible. The easiest way is by using a Cross tab table where you have the count of employees as measure and the Performance rating on the columns and the Potential rating on the rows. (makes sure you filter out the null and no ratings)

You can also have you own image of a 9 grid and then add 9 numeric pointer charts. Each chart can then be a count where you filter on each performance / potential rating combination. This can have a negative impact on the performance compared to the cross tab table. 

There probably are also other chart types possible as long as you can put your performance and potential dimensions on an X- and y-axis.

Kind regards,

Jeroen

entry.title: Re: How to refresh the token for a OAuth 2.0 Client via R...
entry.content: Here is a code that worked for me, by bypassing the OAuth2 Config to get the Token, at leas this gives me the token:

entry.title: Could not read working days information from TFACS table - insufficient privilege
entry.content:
Another problem that appeared during the update and was not resolved is the Workdays_between function, this function was the subject of several notes 3396583 and 3300174 which allowed the function to work correctly

 
Since the January update on SAP Datasphere, Analytics models fall into error when fact views that use the function with the following error:
 
The query executed with errors.
Caught exception : exception 70002048: column store error: exception 334060: Could not read working days information from TFACS table "SPACE001"."TFACS_ABC" - insufficient privilege: Detailed info for this error can be found with guid '9A184BAE96589C49AA8F7EFFBCCEF981' at Authorization/insuffPriv/impl/InsufficientPrivilegeThrow.cpp:365
 
It should be noted that this happens if the Fact view is shared and therefore the analytical model is in a different space than the useful TFACS remote table.
 
The view and the tables are shared but without solving the problem

 If the model is created in the same space as the TFACS view/table, the model works correctly.

By Patrice Mathieu

entry.title: Re: How to refresh the token for a OAuth 2.0 Client via R...
entry.content: types: begin of tp_token, access_token type string, end of tp_token. data: l_user type string, l_auth type string, M_TOKEN type STRING , l_url type string, ls_token type tp_token. * Get new token from the authentication server l_url = '[Connection to Token URL]'. cl_http_client=>create_by_url( exporting url = l_url importing client = data(lo_http_client) " HTTP Client Abstraction exceptions argument_not_found = 1 " Communication Parameters (Host or Service) Not Available plugin_not_active = 2 " HTTP/HTTPS communication not available internal_error = 3 " Internal Error (e.g. name too long) others = 4 ). call method lo_http_client->request->set_version exporting version = if_http_request=>co_protocol_version_1_1. * Set up the HTTP Post call method lo_http_client->request->set_method exporting method = 'POST'. lo_http_client->request->set_header_field( name = 'Content-Type' value = 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded' ). l_auth = '[clientSecret]'. l_user = '[clientID]'. * Body of POST Request (SET_CDATA) and Content Length: concatenate 'grant_type=password' '&' 'client_id=' l_user '&' 'client_secret=' l_auth '&' 'username= ' '[username]' '&' 'password=' '[password]' into data(lv_cdata). data(lv_length) = strlen( lv_cdata ). call method lo_http_client->request->if_http_entity~set_cdata exporting data = lv_cdata length = lv_length offset = 0. lo_http_client->send( exceptions http_communication_failure = 1 http_invalid_state = 2 ). lo_http_client->receive( exceptions http_communication_failure = 1 http_invalid_state = 2 http_processing_failed = 3 ). " Read the result and save the token data(lv_result) = lo_http_client->response->get_cdata( ). /ui2/cl_json=>deserialize( exporting json = lv_result " JSON string changing data = ls_token " Data to serialize ). m_token = ls_token-access_token.

entry.title: Employee master upload issues through LSMW
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

We have an issue while uploading Employee master through LSMW tool in SAP S/4HANA.  

We could not progress in uploading from infotype 0009 (Bank Details), 588 (Provident Fund, Income Tax Regime), 587 (ESI), 185 (Personnel ID - Aadhaar, PAN, UAN, Gratuity number).

Could you please advise on how to upload Employee master successfully in SAP S/4HANA using LSMW tool. This requirement is for India specific.

Also, please advise any alternate options available for uploading Employee master like BAPI. 

Please advise. 

Thank you,

kind regards

Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: Re: Duplicate Records in Story Reports using Performance...
entry.content:
Hi,

It will depend on how you created your query but be aware that when a form is not yet completed then you can get multiple rows because the employee can still be rating, the manager can still be rating and other participant can still be rating. For each participant you will get an additional row. You can work with filters to get the row you would like to see. For example from the manager.

Kind regards,

Jeroen

entry.title: Création de rôles composites dans SAP
entry.content:
En tant qu'administrateur, vous souhaiterez peut-être créer un menu de rôle personnalisé pour certains rôles. Ainsi, les utilisateurs peuvent accéder à leurs transactions ou sites Web fréquemment utilisés en un seul clic. Nous savons tous qu'un utilisateur individuel peut facilement ajouter des transactions ou des sites Web dans le dossier favori de son compte personnel. Comment personnaliser le menu pour un rôle alors ? SAP peut vous aider dans cette situation. Le blog suivant vous montrera comment personnaliser le menu des rôles par étapes.

1.      Tapez PFCG dans le champ de commande de la barre d'outils standard. Vous accédez alors à l'écran suivant.

Entrez le rôle : SINGLE_ROLE_1_E-xxx (vous pouvez trouver votre rôle dans SU01)

 

                   

Cliquez sur le bouton de modification

 

Sélectionnez l' onglet Menu dans l'écran Modifier les rôles

Mettez en surbrillance le dossier « Menu rôle » ( ne cliquez pas sur la flèche – cliquez sur le symbole du dossier juste avant le menu rôle )

Cliquez ensuite sur l’icône du dossier comme indiqué ci-dessous.

 

L'écran Créer un dossier s'affiche. Entrez le nom du dossier : Menu personnalisé

Cliquez

 

 

 

 

Un nouveau dossier nommé Menu personnalisé sera ajouté au menu Rôle comme indiqué ci-dessous : 

 

2.      Créez maintenant un autre dossier nommé Extras sous le menu Personnalisé .

Mettez en surbrillance le dossier « Menu personnalisé » , puis cliquez sur l’icône du dossier comme indiqué à l’étape 1 précédente et créez un nouveau dossier appelé Extras .

L'écran suivant devrait apparaître avec un nouveau dossier Extra sous Menu personnalisé . 

 

3.      Sélectionnez maintenant le menu personnalisé et cliquez sur le bouton Transactions . 

Saisissez le code de transaction VA05 et appuyez sur Entrée. Le texte sera renseigné automatiquement

       Cliquez sur Attribuer des transactions

 

 

      L'écran suivant s'affiche. La liste des transactions de commandes client apparaît sous le dossier Menu personnalisé .

 

 

Vous remarquerez que la transaction a été ajoutée au menu personnalisé.

4. Sélectionnez maintenant le dossier Extras et cliquez sur le bouton Autre 

 

 

      L'écran suivant apparaîtra

 

 

Assurez-vous que l'adresse Web ou le fichier est sélectionné et cliquez sur 

Tapez l'adresse Web souhaitée :

 

 

Cliquez sur Entrée et vous remarquerez qu’une entrée de moteur de recherche a été ajoutée au dossier Extras .

5. Cliquez sur l'onglet Autorisations

 

Cliquez sur  Modifier les données d'autorisation . Et cliquez sur Oui pour enregistrer le rôle.

6. L' écran Modifier le rôle : autorisations apparaît

Cliquez sur le triangle jaune juste avant REPRÉSENTANT COMMERCIAL. 

 

La fenêtre suivante apparaîtra. Acceptez-la en appuyant sur Entrée

 

 

Cliquez sur le bouton Enregistrer , puis sur Générer un profil   dans la barre d'outils standard

 

 

Cliquez sur  Retour, vous remarquerez que tous les onglets, y compris Autorisation et Utilisateur, sont devenus verts.

7. Actualisez le rôle composite pour refléter les modifications apportées aux deux rôles uniques :

Cliquez sur Retour jusqu'à atteindre l' écran Maintenance des rôles

Entrez le rôle : Z_COMPOSITE _ROLE_3_E-XXX (vous pouvez trouver un rôle composite à l'aide de SUIM)

 

8. Cliquez sur le bouton Modifier et cliquez sur l'onglet Menu , puis cliquez sur le bouton de menu Lire

 

Cliquez sur le bouton Réimporter , puis sur Enregistrer. L'onglet Menu de l'écran Modifier les rôles ressemble à l'écran suivant :

entry.title: Re: XML Namespace Error with XPATH condition
entry.content: Hi Snayak, Thanks, it worked! Thanks Maik and Ryan for your valuable response.

entry.title: i have set of gross up wage types net amount it is added to cumulation , but in RT it is not added
entry.content:
Hi community

i have set of gross up wage types 3667, 3668, 3669, 3670 for country CA. net wage type cumulation is marked to /190, but in RT it is not added to /190.

 

Solution: i have updated the processing class 20 with 8 unchanged reference and added to cumulation. it is now working

entry.title: Re: Build Process Automation - Monitoring Tiles to WZ
entry.content: Got it. Its there in Control Tower Environments Public More > Processes and Workflows

entry.title: Re: Advance Workflow in Incentive Management SF configration
entry.content:
Hello @Sayyid ,

1. What do you have in mind with other functionalities? The workflow component is focused on the creating and working with custom workflows and their surrounded processes (like sending out mail notifications to case assignees). 

2. You can trigger API calls from a workflow case with a script. This way you could use the incentive management pipeline API endpoint to start pipelines from workflow

3. There is a Workflow API you can use to work with workflow objects from outside of workflow. You can find the documentation here: Workflow API Documentation

4. As far as I know you need to contac SAP Support for that. It is recommended to work with the IM APIs instead of direct DB Access though (see Accessing Incentive Management Database from Workflow )

entry.title: Re: How to refresh the token for a OAuth 2.0 Client via R...
entry.content: Thanks! This is similar to what we were using 2 years ago, before we switched to using OA2C_CONFIG.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud User and Team Provisioning SCIM API Best Practices and Sample Scripts
entry.content: Well done on the Blog

entry.title: Re: How to refresh the token for a OAuth 2.0 Client via R...
entry.content: But this bypassed OA2C_CONFIG completely, right? Our issue with this back then was a. we would like to use OA2C_CONFIf as it's the "official" SAP way and b. We had to store the client secret, or request it every time.

entry.title: Re: How to refresh the token for a OAuth 2.0 Client via R...
entry.content: Yes this bypasses the OA2C_CONFIG completely, and I agree I wanted to use this standard SAP way for this type of authentication and it looked very promising. However there is a preasure from the client to have this automated, so I will bypass it now and follow the development on a better standard solution from SAP.

entry.title: Re: Print Form Adaptation in Sales/Service 2: Get XML data for preview in Adobe LiveCycle Designer
entry.content:
Hi @sari_irfan,

Sorry, for the late response!

In Version 2, you only need to add the extension field to the service (Settings -> Extensibility Administration --> choose service/business entity --> Custom Fields ). No additional "add to form" tasks. 🙂

After you have added the field to the service, it will be included in the PDF generation automatically (given that it contains a value in the object instance you're creating the PDF for).

Extension fields are located in a separate node of the data json/xml called "extensions".
In an example for the sales quote, I have created a field called "ItemPrintOption". In this case, the binding of a text field in ALD would be: $.extensions.ItemPrintOption

Hope that helps!

Best regards,
Felix

Philipp

kind regards,

Philipp

entry.title: SAP BTP, Kyma runtime: APIRule migration - timelines
entry.content:
Hello everyone! A couple of months ago, I published two blog posts:

  • SAP BTP, Kyma runtime: APIRule migration—noAuth and jwt handlers
  • SAP BTP, Kyma runtime: APIRule migration—ORY Oathkeeper based OAuth2 handlers

The blog posts explain migration details focusing on API. Now, I would like to focus on timelines and important milestones. 

Timeline Overview

Let's quickly recap the events surrounding the migration to the stable v2 version of APIRule. API Gateway 2.7.0, promoted to the regular channel on October 28, 2024, introduced a fully functional APIRule v2alpha1. At the same time, APIRule v1beta1 became deprecated and scheduled for deletion. These two events opened a testing window, allowing you to start testing the API and the migration procedure, report any bugs, and provide feedback. By the end of March 2025, we plan to extend the API Gateway module with stable APIRule v2, and APIRule v2alpha1 will become deprecated. This date also opens a migration window, letting you change your configurations to version v2. In mid-May 2025, APIRule v1beta1 will be deleted, and finally, in mid-June 2025, APIRule v2alpha1 will be deleted. Then, the API Gateway module will only serve stable APIRule v2. 

Milestones

October 28, 2024 - Introduced APIRule v2alpha1 (current state of the art)

The API Gateway module introduced a fully functional APIRule v2alpha1 that, in the future, will replace version v1beta1. The v2alpha1 API and its functionalities are considered stable and are expected to be promoted to v2 with minimal to no changes. APIRule v2alpha1 was introduced to give you the possibility to get familiar with the new API, test it out, and share your feedback. The API Gateway module fully supports migration to version v2alpha1, ensuring zero downtime during the process.  At this point, no immediate action is required. Do not underestimate this change, though, and start planning for the next milestone. We highly encourage you to test the migration process to estimate the required effort accurately and thoroughly understand the changes. Can you already migrate? Yes! We are not discouraging this approach as we fully support APIRule v2alpha1 and provide assistance in case of any issues. You must remember, though, that APIRule v2alpha1 is not the final version and will be removed in June 2025.

APIRule v2alpha1 is not the final version and will be removed in June 2025. Therefore, you must migrate all APIRules to version v2 by that date.

March 31, 2025 - APIRule v2 stable version

That will be the day! APIRule v2 will come to life. On March 31, 2025, APIRule v2 will become the official stable version and the main serving version. This means that when you run the command 'kubectl get apirules -A -o yaml`, APIRule v2 will be displayed by default. To request version v1beta1 or v2alpha2, you must explicitly specify these versions in the commands. For example, you can use `kubectl get apirules.v2alpha2.gateway.kyma-project.io my-rule -o yaml` or `kubectl get apirules.v1beta1.gateway.kyma-project.io  my-rule -o yaml`. This is especially important if you rely on CI/CD tools or use the command-line interface to list deployed resources.

APIRule v2alpha1 and v2 are not fully compatible with v1beta1, so it might happen that v1beta1 rules, such as OAuth2 handlers, won't be fully displayed as v2alpha1 or v2.

You might be wondering: What will happen to my old APIRules? The answer is nothing will change immediately. They will still be there and continue functioning until May 12, 2025. To view them, you must explicitly request the v1beta1 version.

The introduction of v2 will start the migration window. During this period, migrating all APIRules from v1beta1 and v2alpha1 to the newest version, v2, is mandatory. If you are migrating from v1beta1, please refer to my previous blog posts for guidance. If you are migrating from v2alpha1, it should be as simple as changing the version. 

May 12, 2025 - APIRule v1beta1 end of life

At this point, you must have all your APIRules migrated and saved in version v2. APIGateway Controller will stop serving APIRule v1beta1, the version will be removed from CustomResourceDefinition (CRD), and the API Gateway module will delete all unmigrated custom resources (CRs). However, your workloads exposed with APIRule v1beta1 will not be taken down. We will ensure everything keeps running.

Resources created by APIGateway Controller will not be deleted but will become unmanaged. This means you will be responsible for configuring and maintaining them according to your needs. Additionally, Ory Oathkeeper will no longer be managed by the API Gateway module, and if you have APIRules based on it, you will need to take over its management. The migration procedure from unmanaged resources to APIRule v2 will not be supported in an automated way. Therefore, it is very important that you complete the migration to v2 before May 12, 2025, from both versions v1beta1 and v2alpha1.

June 16, 2025 - APIRule v2alpha1 end of life

Finally, v2alpha1 will be removed from the CRD, and all existing CRs will be stored as the v2 version. From now on, the only version of APIRule will be v2.

Summary

In this blog post, I outlined important events and their corresponding necessary actions. I hope this helps you understand what to expect and plan accordingly. If you have any concerns or feedback, leave us a question.

entry.title: Bill subscription in advance more than 3 months
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Our customer sells subscriptions with recurring fee that are usually billed monthly.
Some of their customers sometime request to receive the bills of the first 3 years all together in advance (= 36 periods).
This seems to correspond to the feature "Early billing" but this only allows to have bills created and closed with a maximum offset of 3 months.
I thought of a possible workaround using an allowance but allowance are only linked to usage-based billing, while my scenario mainly concerns recurring invoicing.
Is there any other way to achieve what I described?

Thank you in advance for the help.

entry.title: How to start loop iteration from the beginning after meeting some condition within the loop
entry.content:
Hello,

I need inputs on below scenario:

I have a changing parameter in the method of a Class which is table <ch_table_name> where I would like to process records in this table. The entries in the table are of same type with different data like, every 19 entries, type of data is same but values will be different.

I would like to delete data in this table if it meets the condition. suppose, continuously for couple of times if condition is satisfied.

I will delete these entries and loop iteration HAS to start from beginning to check data again. Is it possible, if Yes, How can I achieve this?

say, 

LOOP <ch_table_name> ASSIGNING <fs_> WHERE <condition>.

IF <cond>.

<logic to check entries and set index lv_start and lv_end to delete data>.

ELSE.

DELETE <ch_table_name> FROM lv_start TO lv_end.

<logic to start iteration from beginning> . ""=> How to handle this?

ENDIF.

ENDLOOP.

Thanks in Advance!!

entry.title: Re: Duplicate Records in Story Reports using Performance...
entry.content:
Hi,

Very common issue when creating performance story reports.
Please note that each section creates a double line. 
See also KBA 3485851. 

In addition when there are multiple owners in a current step this will also create a new line.

BR,


Lesley

entry.title: Re: SAP Enterprise Messaging for SAP ERP: HowTo-Guide (Part 2 - First use case)
entry.content:
@martin_schffler , @smohan29 : Exactly the same issue for us with BC Sets [this is with latest ASANWEE SP10]

The EDISEGMENT was all recorded into transport correctly

NOT recorded are the table entries for /ASADEV/ACI_ADPT, /ASADEV/ACI_SHDE [and /ASADEV/ACI_CODE, although folk should be maintaining those manually through SPRO].

I manually added R3TR / TABU with the relevant table keys to transport ACI_ADPT & ACI_SHDE.
It would be appreciated if the BC Set could be fixed.

entry.title: Re: Upgrade SAP Business Application Studio to SAP Build Code
entry.content:
Hi @RaminS,

You are right in thinking that SAP Build is the Build portfolio of products, i.e. SAP Build Code, SAP Build Apps, SAP Build Process Automation and SAP Build Work Zone.

However, SAP Build Code is not just an IDE and Joule. It is an entire set of services for both development and application lifecycle management. Maybe this blog can help - https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/why-sap-build-code/ba-p/13755163

Cheers!

Rupa

entry.title: Allow AM / PM for a specific Time type
entry.content:
Hello Community,
This is a Time-off question. I have a request to create a picklist  Allow AM / PM / Afternoon and Morning differentiation, for a specific time type(Holidays) in this case.

The field would be enabled only in case  of half day request and would not appear on the UI for classic requests. I have already half holiday category created. 
Anyone has done similar configuration? any suggestion ?
Thank you very much!

entry.title: Re: How to refresh the token for a OAuth 2.0 Client via R...
entry.content: Sure. I also opened a case with SAP, let's see if this leads to anything...

entry.title: ABAP xstring to binary for attachments in pdf
Re: Crystal Reports XI upgrade path to SAP Crystal Report...
entry.content:
You're on the right track. To upgrade your old Crystal Reports XI RPT files, you'll indeed need two separate components:


- *SAP Crystal Reports 2020*: This will allow you to edit and modify your existing RPT files, taking advantage of the latest features and improvements.¹
- *SAP Crystal Reports for Visual Studio*: This is required for integrating the reports with your Visual Studio application, providing the necessary SDK and .Net Framework DLLs for runtime access.

The trial version of Crystal Reports 2020 you downloaded is primarily for designing and editing reports, but it doesn't include the SDK for Visual Studio integration.


As you've noted, RPT files managed in the full version of Crystal Reports may not be directly compatible with the report designer in Visual Studio, which is why you need both components.


By using both SAP Crystal Reports 2020 and SAP Crystal Reports for Visual Studio, you'll be able to upgrade your old RPT files and seamlessly integrate them with your Visual Studio application.

entry.title: Re: Invoicing in SAP Ariba
entry.content:
Hi @MOHAMMED_TAMBOLI,

Additionally, you can visit Post cXML invoice from External ERP to SAP Ariba page where I came across similar requirement like yours. Unfortunately the SAP Help links are expired but you can check below updated links - 

  • Creating and Managing Invoices, Credit Memos, and Debit Memos
  • Posting the Invoice and Processing the Response

entry.title: Re: BODS Connectivity to Microsoft D365 (Dynamics 365)
entry.content:
I think you should recheck the authentication and configuration steps carefully, according to your error message, cause it's one of the most common issues. Since you're working with D365 and BODS 4.2, and there's no direct database access, you might use OData APIs. 

Firstly, you’ll need to ensure that your D365 environment is set up to use OAuth authentication via Azure Active Directory or register an application in Azure Active Directory to act as a client that can authenticate with D365. Then check that the application has proper permissions to access the necessary D365 entities And finally endpoint OData URL in D365, ensure that the web API in D365 is enabled and accessible.

As for SAP BODS Ensure that the OData adapter is installed and correctly configured in the BODS designer. This is required to consume OData feeds from D365. In BODS designer, create a new dataflow and add a new OData Data Store. In the data store configuration, select OData as the connection type. For the Service URL, use the OData endpoint you verified in the earlier step. After successful connection setup, define which D365 entities (such as contacts, sales orders, opportunities) you want to work with in BODS. BODS will now be able to access these entities via the OData connection.

Also you might use CSV/Flat Files or Web Service as an alternative. (Discussed in this thread -  https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/how-to-connect-sap-data-services-to-dataverse/qaq-p/13929288)

You can always ask for help from special teams like Dynamics integration specialists https://www.hiredynamicsdevelopers.com/dynamics-365-integration-services/ or check their site for guides if you will face any issues.

entry.title: Re: Error in Data Action after activate Data Access Contr...
entry.content: Hello William, DAC is activated only in the project and company dimensions, and the error occurs for all users including admins.

entry.title: Re: 1H 2024 - Release highlights of SuccessFactors Performance and Goals
entry.content:
hello.
What will be the deadline for activating the new goal configuration?
Is development already certain that it will go hand in hand with the objective plan?
Thank you

entry.title: Re: SAP Best practices in Public cloud/Private cloud
entry.content:
Hello @HEPSIBHA 

The Intercompany Sales Order Processing - Make-to-Order (6GC) functionality is specifically available in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition. Once the scope item is activated, the necessary configuration will be automatically available in the system. Kindly note that this is a standard SAP solution and requires an additional license. For Private Cloud, however, it is possible to design a similar business process based on specific requirements, as the SPRO configuration option is accessible

Best Regards

Vivek Savant

entry.title: Authorization restriction based on multi-level categorization in Interaction Record
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I hope you are doing well!

I have question regarding Authorization Concept in Interaction Records. My Client has implemented multi-level categorization for interaction records in CRM. However, now they need that these categorization should be restricted per BU Roles.

For e.g. BU Role 1 get access to all the 50 Categories, while creating the IR. But BU Role 2 gets access to only 25 Categories.

I am already familiar with the concept of Authorization for e.g. mentioned here https://help.sap.com/saphelp_crm60/helpdata/en/4a/b9f63a8ab2c745e10000000a114084/frameset.htm

However, I did not find anything specific to Multi-Level Categorization.

Please help me with this query.

entry.title: Top Reasons to Choose Malgo for Cryptocurrency Development Services in 2025
entry.content:
What is Cryptocurrency?  

Cryptocurrency is a digital or virtual form of money secured by cryptography, making it nearly impossible to counterfeit. Unlike traditional currencies controlled by central authorities, cryptocurrencies operate on decentralized networks based on blockchain technology. Popular examples include Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Litecoin. These assets enable fast, secure, and borderless transactions, gaining significant traction for personal and business use.

crypto development service

What is Cryptocurrency Development?  

Cryptocurrency development refers to the process of creating digital currencies and blockchain-based solutions. This involves building the technical framework for tokens, wallets, and blockchain infrastructure while ensuring security and compliance. The development process can also include designing features for scalability, privacy, and interoperability to meet specific business or industry needs.

Why Should You Choose a Cryptocurrency Development Company? Key Considerations  

Choosing a professional cryptocurrency development company is crucial for several reasons. First, these companies have specialized expertise in handling the complexities of blockchain technology. Second, they ensure the solutions are secure and compliant with regulations. Finally, a reputable firm provides end-to-end services, from planning and development to deployment and ongoing support. Working with an experienced partner saves time, minimizes risks, and ensures quality.

Types of Cryptocurrencies: A Breakdown for Businesses  

Understanding the types of cryptocurrencies can help businesses choose the right ones for their operations. The main categories include:

  1. Payment Coins: These include Bitcoin and Litecoin, primarily used for transactions.

  2. Utility Tokens: Examples like Ethereum’s ETH allow access to blockchain applications or services.

  3. Security Tokens: These represent ownership in assets or companies and are subject to securities regulations.

  4. Stablecoins: Pegged to traditional currencies like USD, these are less volatile and ideal for trading or savings.

  5. Meme Coins: Popularized by internet culture, such as Dogecoin, often speculative but with growing adoption.

Businesses can leverage these categories to align with their goals, whether facilitating payments or accessing blockchain-based services.

Can Malgo Help with Regulatory Compliance for Cryptocurrency Projects? A Clear Answer  

Malgo provides thorough support for regulatory compliance in cryptocurrency projects. Their team stays updated with global and regional regulations, including anti-money laundering (AML) and know-your-customer (KYC) policies. They help businesses follow legal rules to avoid fines and penalties. By ensuring compliance at every step, Malgo protects businesses from potential regulatory risks.

Does Malgo Provide Post-Launch Support for Cryptocurrency Projects?  

Absolutely. Malgo offers continuous support even after the launch of your cryptocurrency project. This includes updates, troubleshooting, feature enhancements, and addressing security vulnerabilities. Their commitment ensures that your project remains functional, secure, and competitive in a fast-moving industry. Post-launch support also includes performance monitoring and user feedback integration to meet evolving demands.

Reasons: Why Malgo Is the Best Choice for Your Cryptocurrency Development Needs?  

Malgo stands out as a leader in cryptocurrency development services for the following reasons:

1. Extensive Expertise  

With years of experience,Malgo has delivered successful blockchain and cryptocurrency projects. Their team of skilled developers understands the nuances of the industry and applies this knowledge to create reliable solutions.

2. Customizable Solutions  

Malgo works closely with clients to create solutions that fit their specific requirements. Whether you need a new cryptocurrency, wallet, or blockchain application, they offer flexible options tailored to your needs.

3. Focus on Security  

Security is a top priority for Malgo. Their development process includes implementing advanced encryption, secure coding practices, and thorough testing. This ensures the protection of sensitive data and reduces the risk of breaches.

4. Regulatory Awareness  

Staying compliant with laws and regulations is crucial for any cryptocurrency project. Malgo’s team is well-versed in global regulatory landscapes and provides guidance to ensure compliance from the start.

5. Comprehensive Services  

From ideation to deployment and beyond, Malgo offers end-to-end services. Their support extends to integrating third-party services, optimizing blockchain performance, and ensuring seamless operation.

6. Innovative Features  

Malgo stays ahead by incorporating the latest trends and technologies. They offer features like multi-signature wallets, decentralized applications (dApps), and smart contracts to give your project a competitive edge.

7. Transparent Communication  

Malgo’s team values clear communication throughout the development process. They keep clients informed about progress, challenges, and updates, ensuring a collaborative and efficient experience.

8. Client-Centric Approach  

Every project is treated uniquely at Malgo. Their team prioritizes client satisfaction by delivering solutions that align with business goals and exceed expectations.

 

Choosing Malgo for cryptocurrency development in 2025 offers expertise, reliability, and a focus on clients. Supercharge Your Crypto Project with Malgo's Expert Team. From understanding your business needs to providing comprehensive post-launch support, Their team ensures your cryptocurrency project succeeds in every aspect. Whether you’re venturing into payments, blockchain applications, or innovative token solutions, Malgo is equipped to turn your vision into reality.

entry.title: Form-Data Attachment to Rest API - 404 Error
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a requirement where base 64 data was being sent from Sender which was decoded and converted in the binary format to be sent to the receiver, but the receiver is accepting the attachment in form-data format.

PFB the screenshot and script which I used to convert my binary file to byte and added the headers following form-data guidelines. 

Header

 
Error Details
org.apache.camel.component.ahc.AhcOperationFailedException: HTTP operation failed invoking https://XXX.atlassian.net/rest/api/3/issue/SZZ-86/attachments with statusCode: 400

Please suggest, If I am missing some inputs and how can I resolve the same.

Thanks.

Best Regards,

Nidhi Srivastava

entry.title: Re: Error in Data Action after activate Data Access Contr...
entry.content: ok, but you still need to check what authorization user has and how the data action is defined.

entry.title: Re: UI does not refresh on delete of instance through cus...
entry.content:
Hi @Shahab2

Did you manage to solve your second issue with the error message? I'm facing a similar issue and would like to know if you found a solution.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: org.xml.sax.SAXParseException: Content is not allowed...
entry.content:
Exceptions in Tomcat logs are pretty common; unless you're actually having a problem they can likely be ignored.

With that said, it looks like it has something to do with SSL.

entry.title: Re: Sending data in excel file from SAP to a shared folder of Virtual machine
entry.content: HTTP 405 means the server is not accepting a POST method call.

entry.title: Re: Can we connect Datasphere Live Models in SAC Excel Ad...
entry.content:
@mahioct 

You can consume Datasphere Analytic Models in SAC Excel Add-in.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD_OFFICE/c637c9ff5d61457eb415ce161e38e57b/f0699641fd0942d28db6077f6d722678.html

 

Nikhil

entry.title: electronic document service installation failed
entry.content:
The upgrade installation of electronic document service post-upgrade failed.

I was able to upgrade to SAP Business One FP204HF02. Now i want to update to SP2411 but the EDS installation always fails.

The logfile shows following abnormalities:

 

[12:09:24][AM FEINSTEN] [OUTPUT1] EDSDeploymentTool execution failed with exception `HttpRequestException`: Request to server responded after 3 tries

[12:09:24][AM FEINSTEN] [OUTPUT1] [0;37;41;1m2025-01-24 12:09:24,061 ERROR [ 1] [EDFBackend.EDSDeploymentTool.Program]: EDSDeploymentTool execution failed with exception `HttpRequestException`: Request to server responded after 3 tries

[12:09:24][AM FEINSTEN] [OUTPUT2] Target installation environment is corrupted. Required dependency SLD and SL services are missing.

best regards

Markus

entry.title: Re: How to start loop iteration from the beginning after meeting some condition within the loop
entry.content: A delete statement that doesn't require iteration or recursion.

entry.title: Re: Duplicate Records in Story Reports using Performance...
entry.content:
Thanks @JeroenA !

I have managed to work around these duplicates using filters. However whenever I include the form's Template Name (not just the ID) I will get two rows for each form. And that is after filtering on the form's step type. Do you have any insights as to why the form template names returns duplicates? I have managed to work around this as well with just using the form template ID's for my reports, but to end users that might be less intuitive.

 

Regards,

Torbjørn

entry.title: Re: Error in Data Action after activate Data Access Contr...
entry.content:
@Private_Member_740375 

Could you check if hide parent option is enabled for the dimension for which the DAC is enabled. Try running the DA by switching the hide parent off and see if it runs. 

 

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: New SAP consultants humbly ask
entry.content: hmmmm great questions, just take it easy one step at a time i will suggest

entry.title: Re: An Introduction to Documentation Versions on the SAP Help Portal for Functional Localization
entry.content: It would be great if SAP Help as a whole joined Open Documentation Initiative

entry.title: Re: 2 Transfer Requirement Generated Against Same Process...
entry.content:
Hello @RA96  ,

Kindly check Production Scheduling profile of header material used in process order , check settings set up for activating Transfer requirement.

Once you understood set up from Prod. scheduling profile then there is config. comes from PP-WM interface.

Let us know your feedback on these settings.

entry.title: Re: ABAP xstring to binary for attachments in pdf
entry.content: No question?

entry.title: Re: Material Master Data Mass Maintenance - Delete value from EAN code/EAN category field
entry.content: Dear Colleague, I hope you find yourself well! Thank you for joining the community. As soon as possible, a technical expert will contact you to clarify your question. I am adjusting the tags to redirect the issue to the right team. Best Regards, Erick Goulardt SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Mastering Variable-Driven Currency Conversion in SAP Analytics Cloud Planning
entry.content:
Dear @Filippo_Naggi 
Thank you for your guide. I tried it for myself and it generally works. Though, I have a question about the currency variable. For my case, it uses the local currency attribute of my reporting units (CHF, EUR, USD and PLN). For my reports, only the currency conversion to CHF and EUR are relevant. As it is for now, the selection is available for all 4 LCs.

Is there a way to exclude or block USD and PLN for currency conversion? This way, it would mean that a user receives an error message when selecting USD or PLN or that I need to (unnecessarily) maintain the exchange rates for USD and PLN in the currency rate table.

Both of these issues are not too grave, but if possible, it would be nice to circumvent them.

Kind regards

Alex

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI MFA with Microsoft Entra (Part I): Integration with SAP Secure Login Service
entry.content:
Hi,

We have configured SSO for GUI using the Secure Login Service. We have a requirement of configuring SSO from power automate to this SAP environment. In Power Automate - for the "Add New Connection" option for the Authentication Type , we have used "Microsoft Entra ID (with certificate)"  option .

The configuration fails with the below error.

The dynamic operation request to API 'saperp' operation 'GenerateJsonSchema' failed with status code 'InternalServerError'. Error response: { "error": { "code": 500, "source": "default-8706b5bf-c37d-4f37-8ff1-0941e411ce20.15.common.europe002.azure-apihub.net", "clientRequestId": "301ewr18b5843-bcf4-4f4b-97f1-866144d90bd4", "message": "BadGateway", "innerError": { "error": { "code": "UnhandledException", "message": "Value cannot be null. Parameter name: Value cannot be null. Parameter name: findValue", "target": "System.Security.Cryptography.X509Certificates.X509Certificate2Collection.FindCertInStore(SafeCertStoreHandle safeSourceStoreHandle, X509FindType findType, Object findValue, Boolean validOnly)" } } } }

Kindly advise.

Regards,

Sam

entry.title: PDFs are sent to external Printer in Image PDF format, not text readable
entry.content:
Team,

We wanted to automate the printing process of few documents to send to external printer(server).

We are receiving the base64 format of the PDF files from an external application to SAP with OData.

We have converted this to binary and used below ADS function modules to convert to PDF spool and send to printer.

 ADS_SR_OPEN,  ADS_GET_PATH ,  ADS_SR_CONFIRM 

But, these PDF are sent to external printer/server as PDF Images, text on them is not readable.

When PDF is opened from SP01, then the text on PDFs is selectable and readable, but only when it reached external printer/server, they are Image PDFs.

When we saw the spool properties, they are GRAW format. I think this could be reason the issue.

We have given PDF1 as Device Type and U(Print using Berkley protocol) as access method to send to external printer.

What could be the reason for this issue? How can we solve this issue?

entry.title: Re: First steps to work with SAP Cloud ALM Deployment scenario for SAP ABAP systems (7.40 or higher)
entry.content:
Hi Dolores,

For my organization I want to keep the cts project attribute as mandatory to keep the created transports categorized in an organized fashion on the managed system. This attribute is important in our transport management tooling when there is a need to do transport management outside Cloud ALM and with standard STMS.  

Is there a way to keep it on. 

Best regards,

Kim

entry.title: Top 10 SAP Cloud ALM News January 2025
entry.content:
SAP Cloud ALM continues to evolve with new features that enhance project management, monitoring, and traceability.

Here are the top 10 highlights from the latest January 2025 update:

1. Job & Automation Monitoring:

New filters in the Analysis page to refine jobs and automation searches by Step/Executable, Executed By, and Scheduled By.

 2. Quality Gates and Requirements:

Spreadsheet uploads can now assign quality gates to project tasks and requirements to user stories.

3. Conflict Resolution Information:

Detailed conflict resolution information is available in the Check Details view.

 4. Checklist Management:
Teams can now be assigned to checklist items for better task accountability.

5. Quality Gate Status Filter:

A new filter for quality gate statuses has been added to the app.

6. Custom Solution Process Management:

Introduced a two-step deletion process using archiving to prevent accidental data deletion. Processes can be archived and later restored or permanently deleted.

7. Event Action Configuration:

Event Name and Service Type are now viewable in the event action configuration screen. Live Search can be used to find variants by these details.

 

8. Transport Check Results:

You can download check results of conflicting or missing objects in a single spreadsheet.

 

9. Test Case Images:

Inserted images in test cases are retained upon downloading and re-uploading the test cases.

10.System Groups Search:

In the System Groups tab, you can now search by system title or ID in the selection list for easier navigation.

 

These top 10 features in the January 2025 SAP Cloud ALM update are designed to streamline operations, improve management efficiency, and enhance user experience.

For more detailed information, visit the SAP Help Portal.

Stay tuned for more exciting updates as SAP continues to innovate and improve the #Cloud ALM experience

entry.title: Group number is defaulted when using Routing Master apps in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
When the user is using Create Routing app(CA01 )to maintain the routing, it will by default display the group number from the last processing.

 

If the user needs to switch to view the routing for a different material, this default group number needs to be manually cleared.

 

Could you help how to remove the default group number value display?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Group number is defaulted when using Routing Master a...
entry.content: The Configuration Activity 'Assign Number Ranges to Task List Type Routing' 102738 has the customizing flag "TL" to control whether the default group number is used

entry.title: Re: SAC - Translation of public Dimensions
entry.content: How can i translate property value descriptions? Is there another way to fix this or not possible in SAC?

entry.title: Re: Access to Maintenance Notification Activity Codes
entry.content: I had looked at the Edit Code Groups app, but was not able to interact with the individual codes. Selecting Codes does nothing for me. I am an administrator, but is their maybe a specific role that I need to see codes?

entry.title: Re: SAC - Translation of public Dimensions
entry.content: mtayibi, You cannot translate property values only headers cab be translated.

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA Trusted Authorization Review (STAR)
entry.content:
Hola, 

Hice uso del servicio y lo recomiendo 100%.  Pude entender más sobre los FUE y como hacer la equivalencia; no es simple y tuvimos hallazgos importantes como que no solo se debe analizar a nivel de transacción y objetos de autorización, sino que se debe analizar también a nivel de actividad.  Vimos casos de usuarios que en general son del tipo 'visualizadores' y debido a que tenía una actividad 'X' (no recuerdo el número ahora)  o incluso actividad * implicaba que ese usuario iba a consumir 1 FUE (uso avanzado). 

Entonces les recomiendo el servicio y graben para revisar nuevamente las recomendaciones y el paso a paso que deben realizar para en análisis.

Como resultado, vemos que se genera pre proyectos de análisis y optimización de roles antes o durante la migración, y luego vemos también que deberá ser una tarea permanente durante la operación SAP S/4HANA.  Mucha tarea para el oficial de seguridad SAP.

Así, sería ideal que SAP pudiera automatizar este análisis en el portal me.sap.com, porque el procedimiento es muy manual y con trabajo en excel. Util, pero requiere dedicación

entry.title: Convert Product to GenericVariantProduct
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I am trying to enable Variants and tried few things which failed:

1. I wanted to snyc existing catalog to new catalog, copy them to baseproducts with suffix _B and change them to GenericVariantProduct while changing the TypePkString in DB, which failed

2. I tried to write groovy Scripts, but they mostly stopped with timeouts from DB.

3. I tried to export the products but it looks like, that not everything was exported.

My Question here is: is there a simple way to deeply copy Products to save them as GenericVariantProducts with small Category changes? Or can I somehow use the CatalogSyncJob to help me out here?

Maybe Groovy was the right answer, but how can I stop the process from running into timeout?

Or ist here a simple way to use flexible Search in impex to add columns from different table?

I hope someon can help me here, the existing two posts in this board were not helpful.

Cheers,

Serdar

entry.title: Re: Sending data in excel file from SAP to a shared folder of Virtual machine
entry.content: Any Alternate solution to transfer the excel file from sap other than POST method?

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports XI upgrade path to SAP Crystal Report...
entry.content:
Hello,

As of CR 9 SAP stopped including the .NET SDK with Crystal Reports. You can get it from here:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/crystalreports/3354091173.html

It integrates into VS 2010->2022 and above. Note: Run the EXE to install on your DEV PC to integrate into VS, all other files are for distribution only, not required to install on you DEV PC, and install the 32 or 64 bit runtime when it asks at the end of the install, both are required for Development.

See my Blog on upgrading your Project:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/upgrading-a-visual-studio-2008-gt-2022-net-project-with-the-latest-cr-net/ba-p/13469215

And NO, you don't need to upgrade your reports, it is recommended to bring them to current versions though but mostly not required. Some DB Clients need to be updated so in those cases you do need to update your reports.

The differences between the full version of CRD and the Embedded version in VS is the VS version uses the old CRAXDDRT.DLL, the Embedded Report Designer, but it does have limitations built into it, also known as CR Basic... it does upgrade to current version of the report.

You can get the history of the Report versions using the SDK.

Create a History Box and use this to get the info:

cbLastSaveHistory.Text = "";
try
{
    // Read File Details from CFileInfo Object
    //cbLastSaveHistory.Sorted = true; 

for (int x = 0; x < rpt.HistoryInfos.Count; x++)
{
    cbLastSaveHistory.Items.Add(rpt.HistoryInfos[x].BuildVersion.ToString() + ": Date: " + rpt.HistoryInfos[x].SavedDate.ToString());
}

cbLastSaveHistory.SelectedIndex = 0; 
    // rpt.HistoryInfos.Count - 1;
    //SP 13
    //•	RAS .NET SDK 
    //ReportClientDocument.HistoryInfos[i].SavedDate
    //ReportClientDocument.HistoryInfos[i].BuildVersion

    //•	CR .NET SDK 
    //ReportDocument.HistoryInfos[i].SavedDate
    //ReportDocument.HistoryInfos[i].BuildVersion
}
catch (Exception ex)
{
    //MessageBox.Show("Error: " + ex.Message);
    //MessageBox.Show("This report has no Save history");
    cbLastSaveHistory.Text = "This report has no Save history";
}

The output looks like this:

So what you should do is:

1. Install CR 2020

2. Install CR for VS SP 37, latest version

3. Open each CR XI report in CR 2020 and Set Location to the DB and run the report to verify it is working and then save the Report to a new location, or backup your originals.

4. Upgrade your Project, FYI, 32 bit runtime is end of life this coming December so set your Project to X64 and not AnyCPU.

Have fun

Don

entry.title: Re: Behavior Change in CDS @Common.DefaultValuesFunction: Help Needed!
entry.content:
Hi Sergen_Batman,

CAP doesn't evaluate @Common.DefaultValuesFunction, so you won't find anything in the release logs. I assume UI clients evaluate it and send the respective requests to get the default values.
Could you kindly provide the implementation of getDefaults? In particular, we could inspect `req.params` and how you use it in your code. You can also trigger this function manually.

Thanks and best regards,
David

entry.title: SAC ADDIN EXCEL - Locked menu
entry.content:
Hi all,

I 've to update an excel file with SAC Addin formulas but all menus in the Designer are grayed (locked) and I can't change anything. (add members in filter, delete or create new Datasource, etc ...)
This excel file was created by someone who has lived our company.

Who know how unlock the menus ?
I Hope it is possible !!
Thanks in Advance!!

Frederic

entry.title: Revealing Hidden SAP Business Network Configurations: Insights for Delivery Consultants
entry.content:
This blog details configurations on SAP Business Network accessible exclusively to SAP Customer Support or Services teams.

It’s tailored for delivery consultants seeking insight into these behind-the-scenes settings.

Key Configuration Principles

  1. Initial Setup
    The provisioning team configures the buyer’s account based on the purchased license.
  2. Account-Specific Configuration
    Each buyer’s account has unique configurations for test, production, and sometimes development accounts."
  3. Cut-Over Process
    At go-live, configurations are manually migrated from test to production, one at a time.

Let’s start from entitlements. This is a set of options that is mostly set based on default values and most of them. Below table represents the breakdown of options:

Download PO Confirmations

Download Ship Notices

Download PO Statuses

Download Notifications

First four options are used if your customer has a custom integration directly with Network and not through CIG. I’ll explore reasons for not using CIG in a future post.

These entitlements ensure SAP Ariba Buying updates Purchase Orders with OC and ASN info. Disabling them accidentally can disrupt visibility for requesters and purchasing teams.

Upload CSV Payment Proposals / Payment Batch

This feature is always enabled by default. Although rarely used, it’s harmless to keep active.

Sign all Invoices with Esignature

This setting is often enabled by the provisioning team, but I’ve seen instances where it wasn’t. For European customers with invoicing in scope, enabling this is mandatory to ensure compliance. Without it, EU invoices lack the required e-signature tag in the cXML.

Label both CXML and PDF invoice documents as ‘Tax Invoice’ for Australia and New Zealand

This setting applies only to Australia and New Zealand. For other countries, customers often request customizations to apply this label to PDF invoices.

Download Supplier Data

 

This legacy configuration is disabled by default.

Send VendorID,SideID and SiteAuxID in outgoing documents

It may apply in non-SAP ERP setups with multiple backends for a customer using SAP Ariba Buying.

Allow Multiple Private ID’s per Supplier

This is for legacy Invoice Conversion Service (ICS), which is no longer actively sold by SAP. It remains enabled by default and poses no risk.

Add missing vendor records based on vendor compound keys in documents

This functionality is unused, and no documentation is available.

Allow Supplier to enter service details for OC

This setting relates to Service POs and their order confirmations. Learn more: See more here: https://support.ariba.com/item/view/KB0407735

Copy accounting information from parent line in purchase order to child lines in Service Sheet

This applies only when accounting is included in the Purchase Order.

Allow suppliers to create invoice directly from service Pos without a service sheet

This is used when customers bypass SES approval to allow suppliers to create service invoices immediately.

For SAP Ariba Buying customers, refer to https://support.ariba.com/item/view/KB0405882

Allow Buyer to activate Supply Chain Collaboartion features

This setting depends on the licenses purchased by the customer from SAP.

Allow suppliers to exclude withoholding tax from Gross Amount

This applies to Latin American countries using third-party integration platforms (e.g., EDICOM) or integrated suppliers sending invoices. Learn more: https://support.ariba.com/item/view/KB0395328

Enhanced order confirmation integration capabilities

This setting resolves multiple issues, including this common one: https://connectsupport.ariba.com/sites#item-view&/178098

 

Allow integration with SAP S/4HANA for central procurement

 

Enabled when Central Procurement is in scope.

Enforce Control Keys for All Suppliers

When enabled, control keys on purchase orders set tolerances for suppliers creating documents. If disabled, Default Transaction Rules apply, and without tolerance configuration, suppliers have no restrictions.

 

Ignore DUNS credential when a matching supplier does not have a relationship with the buyer 

see this for more info https://itsm.services.sap/ kb_view.do?sysparm_article=KB0396609

 

Send shipping cost in invoice item, if order item has the shipping amount

This entitlement is rarely used and lacks documentation. It may relate to the total landed cost feature in SAP Ariba Buying, where shipping costs from the Purchase Order are copied to the invoice.

Require Italian invoice to flow to SDI

For details on the Italian invoice flow, refer to: https://support.ariba.com/item/view/181173

Allow multiple buyer user admins and mass user creation

self explanotroy

Enable document tracking on ship notices

Enable BN4L integration for Ship notices

 

Enabled when Business Network for Logistics solutions are in scope.

In addition to entitlements, there are several other functions that may need to be enabled, including:

  • This feature is typically enabled by default but may be missed during manual provisioning. Key functions include:
  • Providing visibility for default transaction rules, such as 'Copy tax from PO to invoice.'
  • Supporting payment request messages and functionality.
  • Enabling integration with non-SAP ERP systems or non-CIG-based integrations.

Another important configuration:

and:

End point support option enables end point configuration to appear in the administration menu. Almost always is turned on by default for all customers using Guided Buying.

How does end point configuration works is explained in another blog post.

Enablement for pending queue is used in integration with non-SAP systems, when the customer decides to use integration with ‘getpending queue’ method.

Next we have:

This setting is required for ERP-initiated invoice functionality. Learn more::

https://community.sap.com/t5/spend-management-q-a/dsn-erp-initiated-invoice-not-visible-to-supplier/qaq-p/12369910

Next one that is disabled by default:

This functionality, disabled by default, works as described. However, based on personal experience, enabling it for SAP backends can cause issues with processing attachments after invoice posting. This is not supported for API but only for Portal.

This critical functionality is usually configured by the SBN Services team, but it’s important to verify during deployment.

Turn on PDF Generation for organization

 

This option enables the automatic generation of a human-readable copy of an invoice when it is archived.

Generate an invoice copy as PDF attachment to the invoice

Allow for the invoice to generate an attachment, visible in the attachments section at the bottom of the invoice screen. If a relevant business rule is enabled, this attachment can also be passed to an SAP or ERP backend. Some customers prefer having this document in their ERP system.

 

In one case, a customer printed all auto-generated PDFs for physical storage to meet audit requirements, using the paper invoice as the legal document instead of the electronic (cXML) version.

Generate an invoice copy as PDF attachment to the reconciled invoice

This functionality is applicable only to legacy Invoice Pro or Invoice Management customers.

Enable FPA PDF generation for Italy

This functionality includes features specific to Italy for compliance purposes.

Next setting worth knowing about:

The default attachment size is 10MB, but it can be increased to 100MB and often is by SAP Services Team as part of best practices configuration. This is particularly relevant for customers directly integrated with the Network.

Next functionality:

This feature, relevant for the few remaining 'ICS' customers, enables sending invoice PDFs that create INV-type documents in SAP Ariba Buying. Partially captured documents with some fields populated and others containing dummy values can also be sent.

Moving forward we have:

Enable this if Sourcing customers want to invite suppliers from the Discovery platform to their Sourcing events. Learn more:

https://help.sap.com/docs/strategic-sourcing/managing-events-with-guided-sourcing/creating-sap-business-network-discovery-postings-in-guided-sourcing?locale=en-US

Next in line is quote automation. This configuration is necessary to send RFQs from SAP to the Discovery platform.

Other features not covered in this blog post are related to SSO configuration that is possible on SAP Business Network for buyers. Also PDF templates configuration is not covered in this post. This means PO custom template but also Ship Notice, Handling Unit and Quality Inspection templates.

entry.title: Re: SAP System Refresh Through LAMA 3.0
entry.content: is there any possible copy company code specific data through LAma ?

entry.title: ATC Check variants SAP_CP_READINESS vs ABAP_CLOUD_READINESS: which one to use?
entry.content:
Hi all,

eg in a current ABAP Environment there are the ATC check variants SAP_CP_READINESS and ABAP_CLOUD_READINESS available.

What is the expected difference of those? Which one should we use in the future?

They appear to be mostly identical, one subtle difference is in the parameters of the check CI_NO_ORDER_BY "Reads assuming sortedness for SELECTs without ORDER BY":

  • AnalyzeOnlyLocalProcedures is true for ABAP_CLOUD_READINESS, false for SAP_CP_READINESS
  • NonLocalAnalysisDepth is 1 for ABAP_CLOUD_READINESS, 2 for SAP_CP_READINESS

Thanks,

  Wolfgang

entry.title: Images Captured in the Demo text/Bubble
entry.content: Is there a default setting that would prevent images from being captured as part of the demo and practice bubbles and text? I know how to unselect the object, so the images don't appear after creating the simulation. But is there a way to standardize across all authors, so images are not captured at all.

entry.title: Re: Intent-based Navigation - semanticObjectAction annota...
entry.content:
Thanks @patrick_winkler for sharing those links.

I had already seen those documents but I didn't find them useful. They don't explain what the behaviour is and what the different attributes of the annotations actually do. Here are FOR_INTENT and WITH_INTENT definitions together:

From that can you tell that one brings up a popover and one links directly? If anything, those definitions cause more confusion, eg. what does the attribute value  do? It is never explained.

In the the second link you sent, there is absolutely no mention of semanticObjectAction. The only example we get is this:

entry.title: Re: Dynamic Parameter Asking for Login Information
entry.content:
Hi Greg,

Ah, FireDAC must have a Client Database connector that CR uses to connect to it.

CR 2016 is a 32 bit application and CR 2020 is a 64 bit application so it requires a 64 bit Client.

The way CR works is when the DB connection is made CR stores the log on info in memory and releases the connection so the Client doesn't get hit with potentially 100's of connection requests. Normal behaviour...

I suspect what FireDAC is doing is releasing the connection, so each CR parameter will open the connection to pass the parameter to the Client/DB. FireDAC appears to be closing each connection. Because CR Parameters must be set before the connection is made, it's like a Stored Procedure with parameters, the value must be set before the log on info is attempted.

If you enable CRLogger, KBA 1603398 - How to trace data source connections in Crystal Reports using crlogger? [Video]

The log file may show what is happening...

I suggest contacting FireDAC support and ask them if they have a 64 bit Client or if they could have a look at your issue, the log file may help them determine what is happening and why the connection is lost every time a refresh is completed.

Nothing in CR configuration to make this work, no difference between CR 2016 and CR 2020 has changed for this work flow...

Don

entry.title: Fiori Elements - ID as Numeric Value, comata displayed
entry.content:
Hi,

we are using FE in S4 on Premise Scenario.

we have a list of entries which contain an ID which is a numeric type. This is important because in CDS we want to sort these entries as a number and not as a string (when sorting by string 11 is smaller than 2)

However in FE, I we get these entries formatted with a seperator.

Is there an annotation which I can use to get rid of this and just display the number? Or force numeric sorting on strings?

Any help is much appreciated!

entry.title: Controlling the number of times reminders are send for Order acknowledgment
entry.content:
Hi @JL23 

 

we need same implementation which is having issue same as subject. can you please guide me more on that.

need to retrigger the output type based on PO creation. 
email needs to send after 1day , 5days and 10days only. if the vendor acknowledged before this email won't send.
Regards,

Vishnu.

entry.title: Re: Master database creation failed for SAP ASE 16.0 SP03...
entry.content:
According to SAPNote 2489781 and SAPNote 2531326, SuSE 15.5 should be supported.  (There is also a hyperscaler entrypoint SAPNote 2922454 with additional information and links).

However, SAPNote 3018138 also states that the error you may be receiving is fixed in SP03PL11 and higher.  I would suggest moving fully to SP03PL15 (if remaining on SP03 is the current priority) as it is the last PL of SP03.  If the problem is not fixed then, please open a support incident ASAP.

Chris

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite – Access Policies for Integration Packages
entry.content:
Hi @PeterGutsche, 

is there any way to combine Access Policies with restrictions on the actions (editing, deleting, configuring,...) on Integration Artifacts which can be performed?

I have the following use case: In the dev stage, permissions for development teams are separated by Access Policies. After transporting a package to a test or prod stage, we want to have the same separations but we just want to allow configuring and deploying. Editing, deleting,... should not be possible on test/prod.

I know that there is the role WorkspacePackagesConfigure which only gives permissions for configuring. But can we somehow intersect permissions from this role with the ones from an Access Policy?

entry.title: Re: Please advise how to write on WBS Budget Availability...
entry.content: @GiorgioDep, I'm still waiting for feedback from my colleagues. I'll come back to you shortly.

entry.title: Re: Syntax Error Include not found
entry.content:
Did you install some OSS notes related to interface recently and were some related transport requests not transported to next system?

Public events source is include, IF_SALV_EVENTS_FUNCTIONS======IU (with 6 '=' not 5)

  • Is the interface activated
  • Check the interface, public events

entry.content: Brilliant summary of cool features Fabian!

entry.title: Re: SAP Build and SAP Build Code: Comprehensive Tools for Novice to Expert Developers
entry.content:
Hi @FranziMickIT .

Thanks for this blog, there were indeed confusion between Build and Build Code. 

Do I understand it correctly that the old Workzone is now part of SAP Build? If we want to make a Fiori launchpad in BTP and develop workspaces for different user groups, we need to get SAP Build? When you say "Unified Lobby", do you mean for end-users or for developers?

We are an on-premise shop but trying to explore BTP offerings. We can't go fully cloud yet (public sector restrictions), but want to explore services like Ai, automation, integration,.. in BTP. 

Is SAP Build the place to start? I guess the naming is a little confusing to our managers, Build implies tools for development, not services for end-users. Is that the correct interpretation?

Thanks again.

entry.title: Re: Multi AI Agents use case. SAP Maintenance Notification creation
entry.content: Good and clear use case. Want to see how Generative AI Hub capability soon once it is ready.

entry.title: February 2025 Mobile App Updates question
entry.content:
Hello,

SAP recently shared information about February 2025 Mobile App Updates / New iOS Version & Multi-Profile Changes. In February iOS app users will be required to sign in again. What if users use the devices with SSO where they are logged in automatically, do you know if it will require any action for them?

Many thanks for your insight.

Br,
Vaiva

February 2025 Changes

Some important changes are coming to the SAP SuccessFactors Mobile app in February 2025. One change will affect all iOS users, and another set of changes will affect the relatively small number of users who share a single device with others (Multi-Profile Mode).

iOS App Transfer

This change will impact all iOS users who update the SAP SuccessFactors Mobile app to the February release.

In January, as part of a consolidation across SAP, the SAP SuccessFactors Mobile iOS app will transfer from the SuccessFactors, Inc. account to the SAP SE account. The February iOS app release will be the first under the SAP SE account, and anyone who updates the iOS app will be required to sign in again.

We know being asked to sign in again can be frustrating, so please consider informing your employees and support staff of this coming event.

entry.title: Re: Access to Maintenance Notification Activity Codes
entry.content: Hello,Please check the business roles you need to have to access this application.https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('QS41')/S33

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports XI upgrade path to SAP Crystal Report...
entry.content:
Hi Don,

Thanks for the detailed response.

The VS project is actually already in VS 2022.  The RPT files aren't part of the VS project, they are just picked up at run-time.  It doesn't include any report viewer components, but simply uses the CrystalDecisions.CrystalReports.Engine 11.5 DLL to run the reports and export in formats like PDF for the users.

I need to edit the RPT files from time to time and the Crystal Reports XI program no longer works properly on the latest version of Windows, hence looking to buy CR 2020.

So, if I understand correctly I need the following:

Crystal Reports 2020 for editing the RPT files
CR for Visual Studio SP37 CR Runtime 64-bit so that I can replace the 11.5 version CrystalDecisions.CrystalReports.Engine with the V13.x version.

Then ensure my VS project is targeting x64.

Thanks,

Graeme

entry.title: Re: Crystal Report adding command to report disappear whe...
entry.content:
Try removing the @ from the formula name.

Never use the Shift top row characters on your keyboard in the names of anything, those Characters are typically reserved for internal use.

Also, for Command Parameters you should be using them in the Command UI:

There could be an issue with the MS Client you are using, sometimes MS OLE DB Client works and sometimes not...

As a test ONLY, create a 64 ODBC DSN to your SQL Server and see if that works?

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere Connectivity With SAP BTP ABAP Environment(Steampunk).
entry.content:
@CasCriel yes if there is CDS entity with data extraction and Delta-enabled annotations.

 

thanks,

Jeet

entry.title: Re: Defining Business Architecture: A Guide for Your Transformation Project
entry.content: An outstanding article! We've been trying to understand how to reconcile business capability with business process and this is the clearest explanation I've found so far. I also really appreciate the clarity of the problem definition and the context differentiation between small and large businesses. For companies that have grown over time to be bigger, this really helps paint the picture from past (smaller company) to current and future (larger company) and the need to develop processes. The visuals, also excellent. Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Sending data in excel file from SAP to a shared folder of Virtual machine
entry.content: You would need to check on the setup with whomever manages the destination set to receive the content, which based on the information you supplied would be folks that handle Mulesoft.

entry.title: Re: SAC ADDIN EXCEL - Locked menu
entry.content:
Hi @freddelain,

These might be the reason check if you have permission to edit or not. 

1.Check you have read or write permission for specific model level and story level as you mentioned these is not you created. 

2. Check for Data Locking:

Sometimes, a data source connected to the model may also be locked for editing. Ensure that the data source itself isn't locked or restricted. in model level 

 

Kindly upvote if you find it helpful!

Thanks
